class.name: effort_controllers/QuadController
class.description: The QuadController tracks positions commands w/ specified feedforward torques and specified feedback gains

class.name: effort_controllers/QuadWheelController
class.description: Wheeled-quadruped variant of QuadController. Drives 12 leg joints with the same PD+ff law as QuadController and 4 wheel joints in velocity-tracking mode (effort = kd*(vel_setpoint - vel) + tau_ff). Reads wheel joint names from leg_i.joints.wheel.name.
